title: Wound review

treatment_and_management.text: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports mapped postoperative wound identity, dressing, structured care, and clinician-documented management fields.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations

follow_up.text: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.
follow_up.rationale: Supports mapped pain, redness, swelling, discharge, wound-edge, fever, microbiology, and suspected-infection documentation fields.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations

safety_netting.text: Supports clinician-documented postoperative wound-care information, infection-warning discussion, and who to contact if concern develops.
safety_netting.rationale: Supports mapped wound-care information, infection-warning, return, and contact documentation only when discussed by the clinician.
safety_netting.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented postoperative wound-care information, infection-warning discussion, and who to contact if concern develops.

source_limitations: Traumatic mechanism, tetanus, suture removal, scar assessment, necrosis, immunocompromise, wound measurement, blood testing, and fixed one-to-three-day review timing remain unsupported.
The wound diagnosis and any infection assessment remain clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
